name: Block Golem
desc: If all the monsters in your GY are EARTH: You can Tribute this card, then target 2 Level 4 or lower Rock monsters in your GY, except "Block Golem"; Special Summon those Rock monsters, but their effects that activate on the field cannot be activated this turn.
mnst_eff: If all the monsters in your GY are EARTH: You can Tribute this card, then target 2 Level 4 or lower Rock monsters in your GY, except "Block Golem"; Special Summon those Rock monsters, but their effects that activate on the field cannot be activated this turn.
eff: If all the monsters in your GY are EARTH: You can Tribute this card, then target 2 Level 4 or lower Rock monsters in your GY, except "Block Golem"; Special Summon those Rock monsters, but their effects that activate on the field cannot be activated this turn.

mst: Prevents activation of your Effect Monsters
misc: Requires having only specific Attribute in Graveyard
